title: Uma Musume: Gold City TexturePack
description: This TexturePack is 1.20+ but its 1.21 compatible. It's not yet complete, and this texturepack is more like Vanilla+ with Gold City stuff, I am currently open for suggestion "weissucks" On discord.
body: This TexturePack is still work in progress, but if you would like to use it that's okay. But if zou would like to suggest stuff, in discord.gg my user is weissucks, i am open for suggestions lmfao
